title: Verify the absence of vouchers message
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Verify that the message 'You don't have any vouchers.' is displayed.
expected_result: The message 'You don't have any vouchers.' is displayed.

title: Check the first order reduction information
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Verify that the information about receiving a £12.0 reduction upon their first order is displayed.
expected_result: The information about receiving a £12.0 reduction upon their first order is displayed.

title: Verify the 'Invite your friends' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Verify that the 'Invite your friends' button is present and functional.
expected_result: The 'Invite your friends' button is present and functional.

title: Check the voucher conditions
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Verify that the voucher conditions explaining the rules for using vouchers are displayed.
expected_result: The voucher conditions explaining the rules for using vouchers are displayed.

title: Test the 'Invite your friends' button click
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Click on the 'Invite your friends' button. | Verify that the app navigates to the 'Invite Friends' screen.
expected_result: The app navigates to the 'Invite Friends' screen.

title: Check the accessibility of the 'Invite your friends' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Vouchers' section. | Perform a screen reader test on the 'Invite your friends' button to ensure it is accessible.
expected_result: The 'Invite your friends' button is accessible via screen reader.
